'''yazhoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabocha|kabocha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabocha|kabocha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yazhoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzheteth|yæzheteth]] || [[word:yæzhetej|yæzhetej]] || [[word:yæzhetesh|yæzhetesh]] || [[word:yæzhete|yæzhete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhozhototh|yazhozhototh]] || [[word:yazhozhotoj|yazhozhotoj]] || [[word:yazhozhotosh|yazhozhotosh]] || [[word:yazhozhoto|yazhozhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhototh|yazhototh]] || [[word:yazhotoj|yazhotoj]] || [[word:yazhotosh|yazhotosh]] || [[word:yazhoto|yazhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhoftoth|yazhoftoth]] || [[word:yazhoftoj|yazhoftoj]] || [[word:yazhoftosh|yazhoftosh]] || [[word:yazhoftof|yazhoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhototho|yazhototho]] || [[word:yazhotojo|yazhotojo]] || [[word:yazhotosho|yazhotosho]] || [[word:yazhotoko|yazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhototh|yazhototh]] || [[word:yazhotoj|yazhotoj]] || [[word:yazhotosh|yazhotosh]] || [[word:yazhoto|yazhoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhotothol|yazhotothol]] || [[word:yazhotojol|yazhotojol]] || [[word:yazhotoshol|yazhotoshol]] || [[word:yazhotokol|yazhotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhotothotho|yazhotothotho]] || [[word:yazhotojojo|yazhotojojo]] || [[word:yazhotoshosho|yazhotoshosho]] || [[word:yazhotoko|yazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhotothon|yazhotothon]] || [[word:yazhotojon|yazhotojon]] || [[word:yazhotoshon|yazhotoshon]] || [[word:yazhotokon|yazhotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhotothoro|yazhotothoro]] || [[word:yazhotojoro|yazhotojoro]] || [[word:yazhotoshoro|yazhotoshoro]] || [[word:yazhotokoro|yazhotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
